name: task_add_dependency
description: Add an ordering dependency between two tasks. The task specified by task_id will depend on the task specified by depends_on_id, meaning it cannot transition to 'in_progress' until the dependency is completed. Circular dependencies are detected and rejected server-side.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task that will depend on another task

depends_on_id.description: Unique identifier of the task that must be completed first

examples.name: Add dependency: tests must pass before deployment
Add dependency: code review before merge
